resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetPasswordSent: Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox.
agreeToTermsRequired: You must agree to the terms of service.
emailVerificationSent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated successfully.
serviceDescription: IMAGINE is a service where you can create wallpapers and banners from design templates for free. If you create an account, you can freely use the free templates.
servicePremiumDescription: With the $3/month Premium plan, you can access all wallpapers and templates.
guestDescription: Even without logging in, you can download free wallpapers and use free templates. Designs are not saved, and you cannot upload your own assets for use in designs.
memberDescription: You can sign up easily with a Google account or email address. You can freely download free wallpapers and use free templates. You can also save the templates you create and upload your own assets.
premiumMemberDescription: Access premium items and use all design features without limits. You also get access to the Library, which includes saved WHATIF character illustrations.
plansDescription: Choose how you want to use IMAGINE: continue as a guest, create a free account, or upgrade to Premium.
plansGalleryDescription: A Premium membership is required to download wallpaper packs from the gallery.

mypage.title: My Page
mypage.cancelNote: You can cancel or change your plan from the subscription management page.
mypage.portalErrorHelp: Copy the error details below when contacting support.
mypage.freeDescription: Upgrade to Premium to access all templates and the image library.
mypage.premiumDescription: You have access to all premium features.
mypage.cancelingDescription: Your subscription has been canceled. You can continue using Premium features until {{date}}, then it will automatically switch to the Free plan.
